targets.queryText: SELECT 'Market Value' AS "Metric", ROUND((SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio)), 0) AS "Today", ROUND((SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local < (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio))), 0) AS "Yesterday", ROUND((SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio)) - (SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local < (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio))), 0) AS "Delta" UNION ALL SELECT 'Net Liquidation', ROUND(nlv, 0), ROUND((SELECT nlv FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local < (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio))), 0), ROUND(nlv - (SELECT nlv FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local < (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio))), 0) FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio) UNION ALL SELECT 'Monthly Income', ROUND(projected_monthly_income, 2), ROUND((SELECT projected_monthly_income FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local < (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio))), 2), ROUND(projected_monthly_income - (SELECT projected_monthly_income FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local < (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio))), 2) FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio) UNION ALL SELECT 'LTV %', ROUND(ltv_pct, 1), ROUND((SELECT ltv_pct FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local < (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio))), 1), ROUND(ltv_pct - (SELECT ltv_pct FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local < (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio))), 1) FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio) UNION ALL SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) AS "Metric", CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings)) AS REAL), CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local < (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings))) AS REAL), CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings)) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local < (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings))) AS REAL) FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings);

SELECT h1.symbol AS "Symbol", ROUND(h1.weight_pct, 2) AS "Today Weight %", ROUND(h2.weight_pct, 2) AS "Prev Weight %", ROUND(h1.weight_pct - h2.weight_pct, 2) AS "Weight Delta %", ROUND(h1.market_value, 0) AS "Today MV", ROUND(h2.market_value, 0) AS "Prev MV", ROUND(h1.market_value - h2.market_value, 0) AS "MV Delta" FROM daily_holdings h1 LEFT JOIN daily_holdings h2 ON h1.symbol = h2.symbol AND h2.as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local < (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings)) WHERE h1.as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) AND h2.symbol IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ABS(h1.weight_pct - h2.weight_pct) DESC LIMIT 10;
